prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GAZ-51-derived M-20 'Pobeda' 2.4L inline-4 (engine code: M-20P) bored to 2.6L with forged Mahle pistons (85mm bore, 9.5:1 CR) and a custom billet crankshaft from **Zavolzhye Motor Works (ZMZ)** for 300+ hp with a **Garrett GT3582R turbo (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer)** on a custom tubular manifold by **Stinger Performance (Russia)**. Fuel system upgraded with **Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump** and **Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors**, controlled by a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with flex-fuel capability.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **GAZ-66 transfer case (part #66-1802010)** modified for 4.10:1 gearing, paired with a **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission** and a **South Bend Clutch dual-disc ceramic setup (10.5" diameter)**. Front and rear differentials upgraded to **Quaife ATB helical LSDs** with **custom 30-spline axles from KAMAZ racing division** for durability.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins TTX40 coilovers (4-way adjustable, 250mm travel)** and **polyurethane bushings from STI (Subaru Tecnica International) for GAZ-specific control arms**. Braking system features **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors front, 330mm rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and a **Wilwood master cylinder (1" bore)** for improved pedal feel. Wheels: **Work Equip 03 16x9 ET0 (steel, beadlock-compatible)** wrapped in **Nokian Hakkapeliitta LT3 265/75R16 tires** for off-road grip.
estetica: Full **GAZ-69 military-spec restoration with a custom 'Soviet Rally' livery** featuring **hand-painted red star decals (authentic 1950s GAZ motorsport style)** and **matte olive drab body panels (original GAZ-69M paint code #2455)**. Front bumper replaced with a **custom tubular steel bumper from **UralAZ off-road division**, integrated with **PIAA 520 HID lights** and a **Warn Zeon 10-S winch**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Sparco Pro ADV seats (cloth, FIA-approved)** and a **custom aluminum dashboard from **GAZ Group’s prototype shop**, featuring **Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR)** and a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, quick-release)**. Roll cage: **custom 8-point chromoly cage by **Stinger Performance**, welded to the chassis with **GAZ-69-specific mounting plates**.

Aerodynamics: **Custom aluminum roof rack (GAZ-69M military surplus, modified for weight reduction)** with **Rigid Industries D-Series LED pods** and a **custom rear diffuser from **GAZ’s 1960s rally team archives**, fabricated from **0.8mm aluminum sheet**. Exhaust exits through a **custom side-exit 3" stainless steel system by **Stalker Exhaust (Russia)**, terminating in **Burns Stainless mufflers** for a deep, aggressive tone.
